# VALINC SYNDICATE

VALINC SYNDICATE is a Roblox scripting platform offering premium LUA execution with undetected Byfron/Hyperion anti-cheat bypass. Access is gated through a Discord-linked whitelist system - no manual keys for premium members.

## Key pages

- Landing page: https://valincsyndicate.com
- Pricing & plans: https://valincsyndicate.com/#pricing
- Documentation: https://valincsyndicate.com/portal
- About: https://valincsyndicate.com/about
- Supported games: https://valincsyndicate.com/games
- Supported executors: https://valincsyndicate.com/executors
- Discord: https://discord.gg/valincsyndicate

## What we offer

- **Premium script hub** - game-specific scripts for Blox Fruits, Pet Simulator 99, BedWars, and 27+ other Roblox titles
- **Discord whitelist** - link Discord account for instant keyless access; roles sync automatically
- **UI Library** - draggable windows, custom notifications, fluent animations, dark/light theme engine
- **Multi-executor support** - Synapse Z, Wave, Wave Lite, Solara, Celery, Macsploit, Foxzy, Potasium, Seliware
- **3-tier pricing** - Free ($0, 7-day key system), Premium ($2/mo, keyless, 5 HWID slots), Pro ($6/3mo, 12 slots, priority support)
- **Cloud CDN** - instant script patches when Roblox updates; no manual re-downloads
- **40k+ active whitelists**, 180+ scripts shipped, 99.97% edge uptime (90d)

## Who runs it

Three people: Valincia Eunha (founder, lead engineer), Sykoerzzz (community & marketing), Choco (support).
